# Allotly

Allotly is a SaaS platform for managing and distributing AI API access with real-time budget controls. Teams use Allotly to provision, meter, and enforce spending limits on AI provider keys — across OpenAI, Anthropic, and other providers — without exposing raw credentials to end users.

## What Allotly does

- Real-time budget enforcement for AI API usage at the team and individual member level
- Unified proxy that meters every AI request and blocks over-budget calls instantly
- Voucher-based access distribution: grant time-limited or spend-limited AI access without sharing raw keys
- Configurable tiered rate limiting and concurrency controls
- Project-level API keys for granular usage tracking
- Audit logging with detailed metadata and change diffs
- Multi-currency display and multi-team membership support
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration for AI agent workflows

- About: https://allotly.com/about
- Contact: https://allotly.com/contact

- Privacy Policy: https://allotly.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://allotly.com/terms
- Data Processing Agreement: https://allotly.com/dpa
- Sub-processors: https://allotly.com/subprocessors
- Model Arena: https://allotly.com/arena
